LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F)(4) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND THE PARTIES' [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. A PROPOSED ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT ARE LODGED WITH THE PAPERS. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

A proposed order and consent judgment are lodged with the papers.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
